metadata.description: AI-optimized plugins by Christian Pedersen (@dkmaker) — architecture patterns and best practices designed for codebases maintained by AI agents. Perfect for non-developers who rely on Claude to write and evolve their code.

plugins.name: david-the-developer
plugins.description: A collection of AI-optimized skills by Christian Pedersen (@dkmaker). Includes: vanilla-spa-architecture (React SPA + HTTP API patterns instead of Next.js) and customer-benefit-communication (transform technical comms into clear customer value). Designed for codebases and businesses maintained by AI agents.
